results.benchmark: SD-OCT geographic atrophy biomarker segmentation (298 volumes, 43 external)
results.value_str: Dice 0.88 (RPE loss) / 0.87 (EZ loss), EZ thickness deviation 2.15um, ICC>0.98
results.paper_title: Fully Automated High-Precision Segmentation of Retinal Atrophy and Ellipsoid Zone Thickness in OCT: A Reliable Tool for Real-World GA Monitoring
